name: yxj-paper-os
description: Active paper-design advisor for evidence, template imitation, author decisions, and compact writing handoffs.

interface.shortDescription: Design a paper from evidence, exemplars, and author intent.
interface.longDescription: YXJ Paper OS is an active paper-design advisor. It inspects local scientific evidence, reads selected template papers deeply, organizes scholarly-reference functions, resolves reversible design choices, asks only consequential author questions, and prepares a compact handoff for existing writing, citation, figure, polishing, and review skills.
capabilities: Detailed model-led template reading and deliberate imitation
Proactive author interviewing with bounded recommendations
Section, language, citation, and visual Story Cards
Compact handoffs to specialized academic skills
interface.defaultPrompt: Use yxj-paper-os to inspect my scientific evidence, references, selected template papers, and prior author decisions; diagnose the highest-impact writing-design gap; resolve reversible choices; ask me one consequential question only when needed; and maintain a compact writer-usable brief without drafting manuscript prose.
